message:
🐛 Fix namespace section to use full viewport height (#10700)

Change h-full to min-h-full on all NamespaceManager container divs so
the section fills the available viewport height instead of leaving blank
space at the bottom. This applies to the main view, loading state, and
empty state containers.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
